strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and microservices, including handling high-throughput environments at Dunnhumby media.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative and architectural ownership as the Founder of GISCollective, building an event-driven data platform.
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq.
concerns: Complete lack of executive leadership experience; has never held a Director, VP, or CTO title, nor demonstrated scaling a team from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Missing deep, production-grade experience building and operating multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes, regulated commercial environments.
No evidence of structuring governance for outsourced engineering partners or communicating technical roadmaps to a board of directors.
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is fundamentally misaligned with the executive requirements of this Chief Technology Officer role. While he is an experienced individual contributor and Staff Engineer with solid distributed systems expertise, he entirely lacks the mandated 5+ years of senior technical leadership, having never scaled an engineering organization or managed board-level communications. Furthermore, his exposure to agentic AI is highly recent and developer-tool focused, falling significantly short of the deep, production-grade multi-agent architecture required for high-stakes financial decisioning. Advancing him would pose a severe risk, as he lacks both the organizational leadership capabilities and the specialized AI-native fintech experience demanded by this scale-up.
